info.title: FuzeAgent API
info.description: API for managing organizations, teams, agents, tools, tasks, goals, and knowledge base

key.description: Unique identifier key for the tool

default_config.description: Default configuration object for the tool

get.description: Retrieve a list of all organizations
Retrieve a specific organization by its ID
Retrieve all tools configured for an organization

post.description: Create a new tool for the organization

put.description: Update an existing tool in the organization

delete.description: Soft delete a tool from the organization

get.description: Retrieve all goals for an organization

post.description: Create a new goal for the organization

get.description: Retrieve a list of all teams
Retrieve a specific team by its ID

post.description: Add an existing agent to a team

get.description: Retrieve all tasks assigned to a team

post.description: Create a new task for the team

get.description: Retrieve all organization tools with team-specific settings

put.description: Update enable/disable and config override for a tool at team level

get.description: Retrieve a list of all agents
Retrieve a specific agent by its ID

put.description: Update an agent's details and configuration

get.description: Retrieve all tasks assigned to an agent

post.description: Create a new task for the agent

get.description: Retrieve effective tools for an agent (with inheritance from organization and team)

put.description: Update enable/disable and config override for a tool at agent level

get.description: Retrieve all conversations for an agent

post.description: Create a new conversation for the agent

get.description: Retrieve all messages in a conversation

post.description: Send a new message to the conversation

put.description: Update the status of a conversation

get.description: Retrieve a list of available agent templates

put.description: Assign an existing task to a specific agent

get.description: Retrieve knowledge documents for a team

post.description: Upload a new knowledge document to the team
Add knowledge content from a URL

delete.description: Delete a knowledge document from the team

get.description: Retrieve the content of a knowledge document
